---
title: "Garnets Li7La3M2O13 (M = Ta, Nb): Stable phases and superior ionic conductors?"
author: ["Henry A. Cortés", "Bikram Kumar Das", "Herbert Früchtl", "Tanja van Mourik", "Venkataraman Thangadurai","Elena Akhmatskaya","Mauricio R. Bonilla"]
date: 2026-06-15
publication: "Journal of Power Sources, **677**, 240034 (2026)."
categories: ["SSBs"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jpowsour.2026.240034
url_preprint:
journ: "Journal of Power Sources"
issue: 677
page: 240034
year: 2026
image: featured.png
pub_number: 19

---
